text:
- **`models_menu.rs`** — role picker → provider picker (skips the prompt if only one provider is configured) → **fuzzy-searchable live model list** → confirm → write [...] 1. **Fuzzy rows are single-line, two-zone**: primary text (matched chars accent+bold) + dimmed metadata suffix in an aligned column. OpenRouter primary is the **id** (not display name — that's what lands in llms.json), metadata `200k ctx · $3.00/$15.00 per Mtok`; Ollama is name + `4.7 GB · 2 days ago`, sorted modified-desc. Never use a background color for match highlight (unknown-theme hazard) and never wrap rows; drop price <100 cols, all metadata <70. Page size 12 with a live `3/312` counter. [...] User: and you just allow a new free-text "new role"? what the fuck will that be used for? distillation is an actually-used role... what's the point of allowing to write a random role that won't be used for anything??? if edge-distillation is the only role we read then just leave it at that... don't allow the user to type random crap [...] - **`catalog.rs`** — live model fetch: Ollama `GET /api/tags`, OpenRouter `GET /api/v1/models` (context length + pricing) [...] | Fuzzy-match substring | accent + bold, NO background fill | same |
| Selected row | accent ❯ pointer; row text default-fg + bold | same |
